`dc/dt = (plateau − c) · [ primary/seed nucleation + monomer·surface·autocatalysis ]`

with a **cooperative Hill time-gate** `t^p/(θ^p + t^p)` controlling lag timing, and inhibitor acting by (a) lengthening the half-time θ (delaying ignition) and (b) suppressing primary nucleation cooperatively.
